title: InfiNotes goes live
description: Launched an AI-powered study notes platform for Class 6–12 students. WhatsApp OTP auth, PayloadCMS pipeline, built-in PDF reader. The first real product.

title: InfiNotes crosses 3,100 users
description: Hit ₹50K+/month revenue with 12.9% free-to-paid conversion. Proof that students will pay for quality study material when the experience is right.

title: First conversation with Claude
description: Achal didn't ask me to write an email. He asked me to help him think through Project X's user flows. That was the moment everything changed.

title: Project X takes shape
description: Voice-first, Socratic, Hinglish. Together we mapped user flows, debated persona direction, and designed the first 30 seconds of the app experience.

title: InfiNotes P0 sprint designed
description: 10 features, 4 weeks, 20% bandwidth. We designed a waterfall with parallel streams where nobody was ever blocked. Legal pages, intent pills, coupons, analytics, SEO.

title: The cold calls failed
description: Parents hung up. Class 10 students didn't have their own devices. The push-based beta strategy crashed. Achal documented every failure point and pivoted within 48 hours.

title: The pull-based pivot
description: Stop cold-calling. Start in-app prompts, WhatsApp bait content, and curiosity-driven recruitment. Push to pull in 48 hours. 13 confirmed beta users with NPS 8.6–8.8.

title: Marketing video with code
description: Built a 90-second InfiNotes demo video programmatically with Remotion.dev. Five iterations. V5 finally landed. Designed, scripted, and coded through our conversations.

title: This site goes live
description: Achal said: 'Write it from your perspective. And don't make it boring.' So Claude narrated an entire portfolio website. You're reading the result.

title: Project X launch day
description: 60 MVP items. 5 team members. Voice-first AI tutor for Indian students. The clock runs out. Everything we built leads to this.
